name: MAIA
description: Multi-Agent Multi-Account Isolation Architecture for per-user profile and memory isolation inside a single OpenClaw agent workspace. / 用于在单个 OpenClaw agent workspace 内实现按用户隔离的档案与记忆管理的多 Agent 多账号隔离架构。

peopleDir.description: Relative directory for per-user data. / 用户级数据的相对目录。

autoBootstrap.description: Automatically create per-user files on first contact. / 首次接触时自动创建用户文件。
